pattern:
# EXAMPLE: <a rel="nofollow" href="{mailto}webmaster"

        (?P<markup><\s*[^\>]*   # <a rel="nofollow" href=   --> markup
            (?:href|src|poster|data|cite|formaction|action)\s*=)

        (?P<quote>["'])        # "                         --> quote
        \{(?P<cmd>.*?)\}        # {mailto}                  --> cmd
        (?P<url>.*?)            # webmaster                 --> __url (see path)
        \2                      # "                         <-- quote
